properties.Test Case: Now, with "By Whole Texbox" selected, record something. Now verify that "By Sentence" is disabled, with a tooltip telling you to clear the existing recording.
properties.Steps: -- Now, with "By Whole Texbox" selected, record something. Now verify that "By Sentence" is disabled, with a tooltip telling you to clear the existing recording.

properties.Test Case: Now, with "By Sentence" selected and something recorded, verify that you are allowed to switch to "By Whole Textbox". (Notice, the desired behavior is not symmetric)
properties.Steps: -- Now, with "By Sentence" selected and something recorded, verify that you are allowed to switch to "By Whole Textbox". (Notice, the desired behavior is not symmetric)

properties.Test Case: With TBT closed, add sentences and make other changes. When the TBT opens, it should re-parse things correctly.
properties.Steps: With TBT closed, add sentences and make other changes. When the TBT opens, it should re-parse things correctly.

properties.Test Case: Make text that has words that you have made bold, some with different colors, etc. Here we're stressing Bloom to wade through all the HTML markup in there while it manages finding senteces, segment markers ("|"), and adding markup for highlighting text, all at the same time. Test play one sentence at a time, and also "listen to the whole page".
properties.Steps: Make text that has words that you have made bold, some with different colors, etc. Here we're stressing Bloom to wade through all the HTML markup in there while it manages finding senteces, segment markers ("|"), and adding markup for highlighting text, all at the same time. Test play one sentence at a time, and also "listen to the whole page".

properties.Test Case: Add a variety of text boxes and comic elements. Record audio. Test changing the playback ordering and then listening to the whole page. Ensure correct ordering: edit tab, publish BloomPUB, publish ePUB.
